meanings.sanmeigaku.main.kansaku: Kansaku-sei (貫索星), the star of independence, gives steadfast willpower, self-reliance and the patience to hold a course alone.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.sekimon: Sekimon-sei (石門星), the star of sociability, gathers people through harmony, cooperation and easy popularity within a circle.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.hokaku: Hōkaku-sei (鳳閣星), the star of natural ease, brings playfulness, expression and a relish for the simple pleasures of life.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.chosho: Chōsho-sei (調舒星), the star of sensitivity, grants artistry and deep feeling, with a perfectionist's solitary, exacting streak.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.rokuson: Rokuson-sei (禄存星), the star of benevolence, draws fortune through generosity, charm and warmth freely given to others.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.shiroku: Shiroku-sei (司禄星), the star of accumulation, prizes steadiness, thrift and the patient building of domestic security.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.shaki: Shaki-sei (車騎星), the star of action, charges ahead with speed, courage and a direct, unhesitating fighting spirit.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.kengyu: Kengyū-sei (牽牛星), the star of pride and duty, carries honour, responsibility and a dignified concern for status and form.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.ryuko: Ryūkō-sei (龍高星), the star of adventure, seeks the unconventional, the foreign and the inventive, thriving on change and risk.
meanings.sanmeigaku.main.gyokudo: Gyokudō-sei (玉堂星), the star of learning, loves intellect, tradition and scholarship, with a nurturing, maternal wisdom.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenki: Tenki-sei (天貴星), the child star, is pure, principled and sensitive, carrying an honourable, well-bred refinement.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenkou: Tenkō-sei (天恍星), the adolescent star, is dreamy and romantic, drawn to wandering, longing and the allure of the unknown.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tennan: Tennan-sei (天南星), the youth star, is bold and vigorous, full of competitive, restless drive and physical confidence.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenroku: Tenroku-sei (天禄星), the prime-of-life star, gives steady working strength, reliability and grounded, productive maturity.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tensho: Tenshō-sei (天将星), the commander star, is the most powerful — intense, dominant and born to lead under great pressure.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tendo: Tendō-sei (天堂星), the elder star, is calm and matured, moving slowly with seasoned wisdom and quiet endurance.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenko: Tenko-sei (天胡星), the convalescent star, is delicate and dreamy, gifted with imagination, artistry and refined sensitivity.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenkyoku: Tenkyoku-sei (天極星), the death star, is detached and spiritual, inclined to surrender, introspection and otherworldly calm.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenkura: Tenkura-sei (天庫星), the storehouse star, preserves and researches, drawn to the past, accumulation and patient depth.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenso: Tensō-sei (天馳星), the spirit star, is swift and restless, charged with quick, almost otherworldly energy that never rests.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenpo: Tenpō-sei (天報星), the gestation star, is endlessly changeable and adaptive — a restless energy of beginnings and constant motion.
meanings.sanmeigaku.subordinate.tenin: Ten'in-sei (天印星), the infant star, is innocent and endearing, blessed with the goodwill and protection of those around it.
